title: ononis viscosa subsp. subcordata
intro: Ononis viscosa subsp. subcordata is a plant species within the Ononis genus, commonly known as a type of sticky bird's foot or sticky restharrow, a perennial legume native to Europe and parts of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. Ononis viscosa subsp. subcordata has been traditionally used to address issues such as digestive problems, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, providing relief from inflammation and infection. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, allowing for a range of applications in traditional medicine and folk remedies.
